name: Print and Screen Capture Policy Violation
description: Responds to print and screen capture policy violations on endpoints handling sensitive data. Riggs AI analyzes the alert to determine if the capture involved sensitive content (classified documents, PII, financial data) and whether the user has authorization. Confirmed violations trigger evidence logging, user warning, and manager notification. Repeat offenders are escalated to the insider threat team. Designed for SOC analysts handling endpoint DLP alerts.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Warn user of policy violation and notify manager for repeat offenses

data.title: Print/Screen Capture Alert
data.summary: Triggers on endpoint DLP alerts for print or screen capture of sensitive content

data.title: AI Insider Threat Assessment
data.summary: Riggs AI assesses the capture event for insider threat indicators and data sensitivity

config.custom_instructions: Evaluate whether the print or screen capture involved sensitive data. Check user's role, authorization level, and recent behavior patterns. Determine if this is a policy awareness issue or potential insider threat.

data.title: Sensitive Content Captured?
data.summary: Branch based on whether the captured content is confirmed sensitive

data.title: Log Evidence
data.summary: Record the violation evidence including timestamp, user, application, and content metadata

data.title: Repeat Offender?
data.summary: Check if the user has prior print/capture policy violations

data.title: Escalate to Insider Threat Team
data.summary: Escalate repeat offender to insider threat team and notify manager

data.title: Warn User — First Offense
data.summary: Send a policy awareness warning to the user for first-time violation

data.title: Close Alert — Non-Sensitive
data.summary: Captured content is not sensitive, close alert

config.note: Print/screen capture alert reviewed by Riggs AI. Content captured does not contain sensitive data or user has appropriate authorization. Closing alert.

data.title: Playbook Complete
data.summary: Print/screen capture policy violation workflow finished

config.summary: Print and screen capture policy violation response completed
